title: Ticket
description: A Zendesk Support ticket representing a customer service request.

url.description: The API URL of the ticket.

external_id.description: An ID from an external system.

raw_subject.description: The original subject of the ticket as entered by the requester.

description.description: The first comment on the ticket (read-only after creation).

status.description: The current status of the ticket.

recipient.description: The original recipient email address of the ticket.

requester_id.description: The ID of the user who requested the ticket.

submitter_id.description: The ID of the user who submitted the ticket.

assignee_id.description: The ID of the agent assigned to the ticket.

organization_id.description: The ID of the organization associated with the ticket.

group_id.description: The ID of the group assigned to the ticket.

collaborator_ids.description: IDs of users currently CC'd on the ticket.

follower_ids.description: IDs of agents currently following the ticket.

email_cc_ids.description: IDs of agents or end users currently CC'd on the ticket.

forum_topic_id.description: The ID of the topic in the community forum, if applicable.

problem_id.description: For incident tickets, the ID of the associated problem ticket.

has_incidents.description: Whether the ticket has been marked as a problem with incidents.

is_public.description: Whether the ticket has a public comment.

due_at.description: The due date for task tickets (ISO 8601).

satisfaction_rating.description: The satisfaction rating of the ticket, if rated.

sharing_agreement_ids.description: IDs of sharing agreements used for the ticket.

custom_status_id.description: The ID of a custom ticket status.

followup_ids.description: IDs of follow-up tickets created from this ticket.

ticket_form_id.description: The ID of the ticket form used for this ticket.

brand_id.description: The ID of the brand this ticket is associated with.

from_messaging_channel.description: Whether the ticket originated from a messaging channel.

updated_at.description: When the ticket was last updated (ISO 8601).
